description_long: This is a male adult figure with arms extended horizontally, wearing a horizontally striped long-sleeve shirt and straight-cut pants. The figure has a full head of voluminous, curly hair and is depicted with a neutral facial expression. The shoes are athletic in style, with visible laces and a thick sole, suggesting casual or everyday urban wear. The clothing fits loosely, with the shirt draping over the torso and the pants falling straight to the ankles. The hands are open and fingers slightly spread, and the overall build is average, with no visible accessories or carried items. The surface of the figure is smooth and slightly glossy, giving it a stylized, almost plastic-like appearance.
description: An adult male figure with curly hair, wearing a striped long-sleeve shirt, straight pants, and athletic shoes, arms extended outward. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, with a stylized, casual urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, full chest, arms extended, and detailed features of the shirt and shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm's extension, and the straight fall of the pants.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the back of the head, shirt, and pants, with both arms extended and no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, arm, and the side seam of the pants and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve casual shirt and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
